visual_description:
The scene opens with a medium close-up on an older man with short, graying hair. He is wearing a light-colored suit jacket over a light blue collared shirt and a dark tie. He looks down with a serious and contemplative expression. To his left, a younger man with dark hair, wearing a dark, patterned shirt, is partially visible, looking on. The setting is a dimly lit interior with a cool, greenish-blue color palette. In the background, another man in a dark suit is out of focus. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the upper left corner. The camera is steady, focusing on the older man's face and upper body. The audio opens with a man speaking in a calm, authoritative voice, giving a short, direct command in Chinese. His tone is firm and slightly impatient, as if he's addressing subordinates in a serious situation. In the background, a low, tense, and slightly ominous ambient score plays, creating a suspenseful and serious atmosphere.

The camera angle shifts slightly, showing more of the older man as he begins to speak and gesture with his right hand. The younger man to his left remains in the frame, looking forward. The background is a dark, clutter
